raw_consumer_statement: Made a purchase for {$56.00} + Tax. Card company rejected purchase. Vendor said use another card. That was also rejected by that vendor. I Closed computer screen realizing I was being scammed. When checking my Barclays account I saw a charge in pending for {$110.00} that eventually grew to XXXX different companies all of which were rejected. I called Barclays to report fraud. The charges were removed from pending. I talked to Barclays the day of the charge, the day after and the day after and was assured the charges were gone. Then I get an alert from them about XXXX on the charges so I check my account then and the day after and nothing is listed as pending or posted. Then I get another alert today and check my account and there is {$110.00} in posted. I call and get a run around. It is obvious Barclays accepted a charge after a number of phone conversations and removals. So I now see myself as a victim of fraud from the vendor and from XXXX 's. Barclays cancelled by card and issued a new one which has not arrived yet so I am losing vacation points on every purchase I make on another card. I am just an ornery XXXX XXXX XXXX who pays his bills and doesn't ever pay interest to a credit card company. I expect my card company to not pay fraud especially when they recognize it on the first try. There should be no excuse for them raising my XXXX XXXX every time I open my account. I had government Inspectors harassing me as they do most honest business for decades before I retired. Go harass Barclays.
